original_image_tags: Pink paper document, likely the back of a routing slip or teletype sheet, showing multiple blue ink date/time stamps from the FBI and Department of Justice offices. Faint, illegible text is visible bleeding through from the other side of the paper. There are two hole-punch marks at the top edge, one appearing dark/black.

elements.description: A pinkish page covered in multiple blue ink stamps. Two holes are visible at the top. Stamps include 'RECEIVED-LADD FBI U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE' with date 'AUG 4 8 07 PM '47'; 'RECEIVED TELETYPE UNIT AUG 4 5 37 PM '47 F.B.I. DEPT. OF JUSTICE'; and multiple stamps for 'RECEIVED INTERNAL SECURITY F.B.I. DEPT. OF JUSTICE' and 'RECEIVED LIAISON SECTION F.B.I. DEPT. OF JUSTICE' with various dates and times (e.g., 'AUG 5 10 18 AM', 'AUG 8 11 11 AM '47', 'AUG 5 2 03 PM '47'). Faint reversed typed text is visible bleeding through from the reverse side of the page.

judge.reason: Description B quotes specific stamp text that Description A does not see, and both describe stamps as the primary visual content but with contradictory levels of detail and verbatim claims.
